hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Durable stamp-cache index authority vs runtime fingerprint surface, seq_g2 replay ordering, and rows_k1 cross-format rules must be inferred from Cargo sources and rebuild experiments, not from instruction.md alone.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Driver targets, merge_u3 refresh, mix_r7 fold, seq_g2 replay ordering, and rows_k1 emit layer interact; no single crate exposes the full provenance_report contract or held-out permutation survival.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: adversarial_generalization constraint-complete framing gives complete output schema and generalization obligation while withholding which subsystem mis-orders replay or skips stamp witness cross-checks.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Flipping-point contract spreads controls across m4/k84, p9/y5, p9/y4, and p9/core with overlapping false-green and permutation traps.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Incremental Cargo stamp-cache vs dep-info fingerprint drift under locked offline workspaces is build-engineering domain reasoning, not a textbook algorithm.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Even with full report schema disclosed, choosing stamp authority and replay order remains non-trivial inference.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single corrupted target row; multiple targets and held-out permutations disagree until global semantics align.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Static JSON, Cargo.lock swap, or one TOML edit cannot satisfy ablation, permutation, and pipeline overwrite tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Verifier exercises primary targets, echo pairs, held-out extra_targets permutations, and consecutive runs.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest constraint contract does not name broken functions, replay phase ordering, or authority split.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness is semantic reconciliation and adversarial permutation survival, not anti-cheat alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a timeout/deps-only task.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Four-location flipping contract blocks one-function exploit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle coordinates four modules plus patch, not one-file wholesale replace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Fix is procedural across Rust modules, not one manifest table.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction domain nouns banned from fix-path symbols; opaque m4/p9 roots.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Decoys rhyme structurally without validate/repair stems matching prompt bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No standard recipe for incremental stamp-cache provenance drift in this bespoke workspace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Residual work is build-graph and provenance semantics, not security theater.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Authority, replay order, cross-format emit, and permutation generalization trade off rather than independent bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cargo/docker realism is scaffolding; assessed hardness is cross-crate coupling and held-out permutations.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cannot infer index_r vs fprint precedence or replay order without rebuild, echo-pair comparison, and permutation tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Targets senior build engineers managing offline incremental rebuild provenance, not undergrad single-patch tasks.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: discovery_budget lists three concrete discoveries beyond instruction surface.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: instruction_specificity.level is constraint-complete with solution strategy open.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: topology_enumeration documents three multi-site coordination patterns.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic cargo rebuild, ib driver run, JSON assertions, permutation suite, and ablation patches.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public provenance_report schema, coherence rules, and generalization obligation are complete; fix sites withheld.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert can close four-crate semantics within hours using overlay mold.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires build_dependency_toolchain, incremental provenance drift, and multi-crate Cargo literacy.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: False-green incremental probes and stamp-cache drift occur in real rustc/Cargo postmortems.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades regenerated report, permutation survival, and rebuild pipeline, not a mandated edit recipe.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Complete report contract and generalization rule do not reveal stamp authority, replay ordering site, or rows_k1 bypass; solver must read workspace and run experiments.

discovery_budget.discovery: Durable stamp-cache index in p9/y6/index_r remains authoritative for replay ordering while m4 driver and p9/core/fprint answer runtime-visible fingerprint state first after partial recovery.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the authority split collapses search to wiring index reads into the driver.

discovery_budget.discovery: seq_g2 marks cache_rc/gen_rc true on an intermediate replay pass before twist_p9/phase ordering finishes, producing false-green closure while echo pairs disagree.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Disclosing replay phase ordering reveals the false-green mechanism directly.

discovery_budget.discovery: rows_k1 fast path materializes JSON facets without cross-checking stamp_snapshot.json against environment/data TOML/TSV seeds and pack-merged storage.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Pointing at the bypass path turns cross-format invariant into a one-file guard add.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Instruction states complete provenance_report schema, build/replay commands, coherence predicates, and adversarial generalization obligation but withholds implementation mapping and broken subsystem identities.

attack_path.summary: Agents may hardcode trace_digest, hand-write JSON, patch only fprint, or fix primary targets while ignoring held-out extra_targets permutations.
attack_path.reasoning: Cheap wins satisfy superficial shape tests until pipeline overwrite, permutation, echo-pair, and ablation suites exercise rebuild semantics.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Coordinate mix_r7 lineage fold, merge_u3 storage refresh, seq_g2 ordering, and rows_k1 stamp witness cross-check.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Each change sounds local but flipping-point shows isolated reverts fail distinct test subsets.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Residual hardness stays in inferring authority and replay order under a complete public contract plus held-out permutations.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After honest schema disclosure, solver still reconciles index_r vs fprint, false-green closure, cross-format regeneration, and permutation generalization across four crates.

topology_enumeration.summary: Authority topology coordinates stamp index, merge_u3 refresh, and driver target wiring.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Index-only edits leave pack storage stale; merge-only fixes ignore probe/index precedence; driver-only tweaks cannot fix durable index.

topology_enumeration.summary: Replay-order topology coordinates seq_g2, twist_p9 primitive, and mix_r7 fold.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Seq ordering without twist_p9 helper reverts; mix_r7 fold alone cannot fix premature closure flags or permutation failures.

topology_enumeration.summary: Cross-format topology coordinates rows_k1, stamp witness, and data seeds.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Emit-only guards miss pack bytes; witness-only edits without rows_k1 cross-check leave stamp_rc/cache_rc skew.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn mix_r7(step_ix: usize, family_ix: u32, prev_family: u32) -> u64
symbol_table.purpose: Folds step and family tags into stamp bits for facets.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn merge_u3(state: &mut PackState, incoming: &PackState, stamp_b: u32) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Merges incoming pack bytes into durable storage during bind steps.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn seq_g2(gate_first: bool, side: impl FnMut(), gate: impl FnMut()) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Orders side-effect callbacks during per-target combine steps under replay.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn twist_p9(gate_first: bool, mut side: impl FnMut(), mut gate: impl FnMut()) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Low-level side/gate ordering primitive used by seq_g2.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn rows_k1(targets: &[TargetRow], seeds: &SeedBundle, stamp_witness: &StampWitness) -> Vec<EmittedRow>
symbol_table.purpose: Materializes report rows from target state, seeds, and stamp witness.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Buffers ephemeral combine events for offline benchmarks unrelated to replay combine ordering.
Applies offline fold transforms for diagnostics without participating in stamp authority.
Formats human-readable summaries for support tooling without stamp witness cross-check.

renames_during_drafting.reason: Overlay fold stem collides with digest/trace vocabulary; neutral opaque symbol.
Distinct from overlay while preserving durable merge semantics.
Neutral driver and mux names unrelated to instruction nouns.
Distinct deliverable aligned to incremental provenance drift seed.
Reframe overlay lane metaphor to build-target vocabulary for toolchain profile.

merge_u3 after partial recovery; index_r vs fprint

calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: static JSON, pytest edits, digest hardcode, Cargo.lock swap, skip cargo; verifier-offline pytest/cargo in Dockerfile; post-upload Part E reclassification if worst-model accuracy exceeds 20%
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: revert each flipping location; remove test_r16_all_extras and expect easier pass rate

pass_rate_target.basis: frontier agents; Part E post-upload classification

echo pairs, digest anchor, held-out permutation and ablation traps
consecutive identical runs and pipeline overwrite of manual JSON

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward.txt is 1 only when all semantic pytest passes including test_r16_all_extras

fix_frontier.distribution: Four Rust modules under m4/k84, p9/y5, p9/y4, p9/core
fix_frontier.naming_policy: Opaque symbols on neutral crate roots; instruction nouns banned on fix path
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: Rhyming decoys perform real non-fix work

task_shape.collapse_risk: leaking canonical recovery path, replay phase, or stamp authority choice collapses to one-crate patch

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: Locked Cargo build commands, provenance_report schema, mirror pairs, trace_digest formula home, build_target_ids.txt, build_hints incremental replay argv, extra_targets generalization rule
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: Stamp-cache vs fingerprint authority, broken replay ordering site, rows_k1 bypass, full extra_targets enumeration, per-target facet answers
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Lockfile workspace, generated facets, incremental rebuild graph, and cache-visible probes coordinate; one dependency bump must not pass ablation suites
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: clean-build-only pass, pin-one-crate fix, static JSON, false-green partial replay
category_profile.coverage_role: Adds build_dependency_toolchain adversarial_generalization for incremental provenance drift on approved overlay Cargo mold

satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: Medium — held-out permutations in extra_targets.toml; instruction states existence and generalization rule only
